log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15
REASONING: Throwing rock at Orc — Iron Concentration (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Orc — Iron Concentration HP: 49/67
--- Orc — Iron Concentration --- HP: 49/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:7+3=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:12+-2=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 2/3 targets affected.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Orc — Iron Concentration.
→ Javelin: [d20:12+6=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Orc — Iron Concentration HP: 36/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):15+8=23 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
